message:
🔒 fix: validate pulseRepo query param in pipeline handler (#8575) (#8580)

The pulse view handler accepted c.Query("repo") without validation,
unlike all other views which call ghpIsAllowedRepo(). This allowed
unsanitized input to be interpolated into GitHub API paths.

Fixes #8575

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
